plugins.name: 1p-local-auth
plugins.description: Manage local dev OAuth credentials via 1Password. Test any auth provider on any branch without swapping env files.

plugins.name: obsidian-bridge
plugins.description: Zero-copy Obsidian vault over your ~/.claude/ knowledge base via symlinks. Browse memory, rules, skills, agents, and plans in Obsidian.

plugins.name: skillforge
plugins.description: Deferred skill loading for Claude Code. Compress skills to stubs, load full content on demand. Saves ~88% of per-turn skill token overhead.
